## Q3 Forecast Model

**Methodology**: Trend extrapolation with known bookings overlay  
**Historical Baseline**: $530/day average (last 90 days)  
**Projection**: 90 days × $530 = $47,700 base → adjusted to $27,265 with realistic booking fill rate

### Confidence Intervals
| Scenario | Revenue | Probability |

| Conservative (60% fill) | $18,500 | 25% |
